parameters.query:
SELECT chunk_id, doc_id, topic, subtopic, title, content, keywords, aliases, categoria_cabine, fonte, score
FROM kb_hybrid_search(
  {{ $json.emb_vector_literal }},
  {{ $json.query_sql }},
  {{ $json.topic_sql }},
  {{ $json.subtopic_sql }},
  {{ $json.categoria_sql }},
  8, 60
);

INSERT INTO kb_queries (session_id, query, topic_filter, top_chunk_id, top_score, has_result, latency_ms)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7);
